title: DNI nominee dodges 2020 election question
shortDescription: Director of National Intelligence nominee Jay Clayton refused to answer Sen. Jon Ossoff's question asking who won the 2020 election.

title: Trump rips New York's 'terrible decision' to halt data centers
shortDescription: President Donald Trump defended data centers and bashed New York Gov. Kathy Hochul's one-year moratorium on the sprawling facilities that power AI.

title: Push to cut Israel aid leaves Democrats fiercely divided
shortDescription: More than 100 House Democrats voted to cut more than $3 billion in aid to Israel, a longtime U.S. ally.

title: What Trump might cover in primetime speech
shortDescription: USA TODAY's Joey Garrison explains what President Donald Trump might bring up in his Thursday primetime speech.

title: Trump says Iran will be 'defeated soon'
shortDescription: President Trump touted the escalation in military strikes he ordered on Iran, saying that he believes Iran will soon be defeated.

title: AOC on McConnell's absence from Congress: 'This is not normal'
shortDescription: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-New York, said that Republican Kentucky Sen. Mitch McConnell’s continued absence from Congress was “not normal."

title: Trump to talk elections in address. See his approval rating in Georgia
shortDescription: Trump is expected to address the nation Thursday on election integrity. Central to his unsubstantiated claims is Georgia. See his approval rating there.

title: Trump rechaza suspender las paradas de tráfico de ICE tras dos muertes
shortDescription: La muerte de un migrante colombiano llevó a ICE a revisar sus paradas de tráfico, pero Donald Trump rechazó suspender una de las principales tácticas utilizadas para detener a migrantes.

title: See Pittsburgh-area representatives votes on Sunshine Protection Act
shortDescription: Here's how representatives from the Pittsburgh area voted on a bill that, if passed, would permanently enact daylight saving time.

title: Treasury to begin minting $1 gold Trump coin. See photos.
shortDescription: The gold coin is the first in a string of Trump-adorned currency the Treasury is slated to mint.

title: Trump says Reflecting Pool will be 'back in service' soon
shortDescription: The DC Reflecting Pool is sitting empty after it was drained a second time for repairs.

title: Blanche grilled on Trump's IRS settlement
shortDescription: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Trump's IRS settlement offers no protection for future taxes and discusses the weaponization fund's status.

title: Trump on ICE traffic stops, Iran strikes and $1 coins. See Trump news
shortDescription: Trump called on ICE to continue traffic stops after deadly shootings. Bessent said the Mint is making $1 coins with Trump's face on it. July 15 news.

title: Joe Biden's memoir release date spares Dems a midterm distraction
shortDescription: Former President Joe Biden's memoir chronicling his four years in the White House, called "Promise Me, America," is set for release on Nov. 17.

title: Trump has said he hates Taylor Swift, but still claps for Kelce's plane
shortDescription: The Palm Beach airport officially became the Donald J Trump airport last week. Now, the president is excited by celebrity landings, even when they aren't fans.

title: Trump overturns ICE's pause on traffic stops after 2 deadly shootings
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said ICE "cannot give up" traffic stops, after the agency ordered a pause following two recent deadly shootings.

title: Trump says Iran strikes will continue
shortDescription: In an interview with Fox News Channel's Trey Yingst, President Donald Trump said strikes on Iran would continue.

title: Birthright citizenship battle returns to Congress
shortDescription: A Republican senator is reviving Trump's push to restrict birthright citizenship with a new bill just weeks after a Supreme Court defeat.
